# Project: Disparities in Sedation Practice by Patient Preferred Language
# Author: Alex Ortiz

# Setup Step - Setup libraries
```{r setup}
# Install Packages

packages <- c("tidyverse", "zoo", "data.table", "dplyr", "lubridate", "tidyr", "fst", "arrow", "table1", "lme4", "metafor", "yaml", "pscl", "MASS", "htmltools", "car", "WeightIt", "MatchIt", "purrr", "survival", "mediation", "cmprsk", "gfoRmula", "nnet", "medflex", "bruceR", "survey", "ipw", "geepack", "readr", "collapse", "stringr", "rprojroot", "tableone", "lmtest", "broom")
install_if_missing <- function(package) {
  if (!require(package, character.only = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(package, dependencies = TRUE)
    library(package, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}

sapply(packages, install_if_missing)

# Load necessary libraries
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(zoo)  # for na.locf function
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(fst)
library(arrow)
library(table1)
library(metafor)
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)
library(MASS)
library(pscl)
library(car)
library(stringr)
library(rprojroot)
library(tableone)
library(lmtest)
library(broom)


# Define paths
project_root <- file.path(
  find_root(rprojroot::has_dir("deep_sedation_language_final")),
  "deep_sedation_language_final"
)

config_dir <- file.path(project_root, "config")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = config_dir)

# Look for both .yaml and .yml
config_file <- c(
  file.path(config_dir, "deep_sedation_language_config.yaml"),
  file.path(config_dir, "deep_sedation_language_config.yml")
)

# Keep only existing files
config_file <- config_file[file.exists(config_file)]

# Error if neither exists
if (length(config_file) == 0) {
  stop("No config file found (.yaml or .yml)")
}

# If both exist, take the first (yaml prioritized here)
config <- yaml::read_yaml(config_file[1])

# Define directories based on YAML configuration
data_dir <- config$data_dir
local_dir <- config$local_dir
output_dir <- file.path(local_dir, "output/")
intermediate_dir <- file.path(local_dir, "intermediate_data_DO_NOT_UPLOAD/")  # Define output_dir based on data_dir
final_data_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "FINAL_DATA_UPLOAD_ME/")
cohort_characteristics <- file.path(final_data_dir, "cohort_characteristics/")
sedation_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "sedation_project/")
sedation_tables_dir <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_tables/")
sedation_final_data <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_data/")
sedation_sensitivity <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "sensitivity_analyses/")
sedation_secondary <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "secondary_analyses/")
sedation_exploratory <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "exploratory_analyses/")
sedation_subgroup <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "subgroup_analyses/")
paralytics_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "paralytics_project/")
paralytics_tables_dir <- file.path(paralytics_project, "final_tables/")  
paralytics_final_data <- file.path(paralytics_project, "final_data/")
paralytics_exploratory <- file.path(paralytics_final_data, "exploratory_analyses/")
paralytics_exploratory_tables <- file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, "exploratory_tables/")
arf_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "arf_project/")
arf_tables_dir <- file.path(arf_project, "final_tables/")  
arf_final_data <- file.path(arf_project, "final_data/")
measurements_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "measurements_project/")
measurements_tables_dir <- file.path(measurements_project, "final_tables/")  
measurements_final_data <- file.path(measurements_project, "final_data/")
measurements_model_data <- file.path(measurements_final_data, "model_data/")

file_type <- config$file_type
institution <- config$institution
time_zone <- config$time_zone

# Create all directories
dirs_to_create <- c(
  output_dir,
  intermediate_dir,
  final_data_dir,
  cohort_characteristics,
  sedation_project,
  sedation_tables_dir,
  sedation_final_data,
  sedation_sensitivity,
  sedation_secondary,
  sedation_exploratory,
  sedation_subgroup,
  paralytics_project,
  paralytics_tables_dir,
  paralytics_final_data,
  paralytics_exploratory,
  paralytics_exploratory_tables,
  arf_project,
  arf_tables_dir,
  arf_final_data,
  measurements_project,
  measurements_tables_dir,
  measurements_final_data,
  measurements_model_data
)

for (dir in dirs_to_create) {
  dir.create(dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}
```

#Upload Data
```{r}
# Upload Analytic File
total_cohort <- read_parquet(paste0(intermediate_dir, "analytic_file", institution, ".parquet"))
setDT(total_cohort)
total_cohort[
  race_category == "asian",
  race_category := "other/unknown"
]
total_cohort[, observation_year := as.double(observation_year)]
# Upload hospital system language information
language_data <- fread(paste0(cohort_characteristics, "/", institution, "_hospital_system_language_counts", ".csv"))
setDT(language_data)

cat_vars <- c("sex_category", "ethnicity_category", "race_category", "hospital_id", "icu_imv", "location_of_intubation", "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag")

cont_vars <- c("age_at_admission", "bmi", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE", "laps2", "time_to_first_rass", "rass_frequency_hrs", "observation_year", "time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours")

```

#Function to Create Table 1s
```{r}
#Function to Create Table 1s
make_table1_federated <- function(dt,
                                  cat_vars = NULL,
                                  cont_vars = NULL,
                                  by = NULL,
                                  site_name = NA_character_) {
  dt <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  out_list <- list()
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CATEGORICAL VARIABLES
  #-----------------------------#
  if (!is.null(cat_vars) && length(cat_vars) > 0) {
    for (v in cat_vars) {
      
      if (!is.null(by)) {
        tmp <- dt[, .(n = .N), by = c(by, v)]
        
        totals <- dt[, .(N = .N), by = by]
        
        tmp <- merge(tmp, totals, by = by, all.x = TRUE)
        
        setnames(tmp, old = by, new = "group")
        setnames(tmp, old = v, new = "level")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "categorical",
          level = as.character(level),
          pct = 100 * n / N,
          mean = NA_real_,
          sd = NA_real_,
          median = NA_real_,
          p25 = NA_real_,
          p75 = NA_real_
        )]
        
      } else {
        tmp <- dt[, .(n = .N), by = v]
        total_n <- nrow(dt)
        
        setnames(tmp, old = v, new = "level")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          group = "overall",
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "categorical",
          level = as.character(level),
          N = total_n,
          pct = 100 * n / N,
          mean = NA_real_,
          sd = NA_real_,
          median = NA_real_,
          p25 = NA_real_,
          p75 = NA_real_
        )]
      }
      
      tmp <- tmp[, .(
        site, group, variable, variable_type, level,
        n, N, pct,
        mean, sd, median, p25, p75
      )]
      
      out_list[[paste0("cat_", v)]] <- tmp
    }
  }
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CONTINUOUS VARIABLES
  #-----------------------------#
  if (!is.null(cont_vars) && length(cont_vars) > 0) {
    for (v in cont_vars) {
      
      if (!is.null(by)) {
        tmp <- dt[, .(
          n      = sum(!is.na(get(v))),
          N      = .N,
          pct    = NA_real_,
          mean   = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else mean(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          sd     = as.numeric(if (sum(!is.na(get(v))) <= 1) NA_real_ else sd(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          median = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else median(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          p25    = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else quantile(get(v), 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)),
          p75    = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else quantile(get(v), 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
        ), by = by]
        
        setnames(tmp, old = by, new = "group")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "continuous",
          level = NA_character_
        )]
        
      } else {
        tmp <- dt[, .(
          n      = sum(!is.na(get(v))),
          N      = .N,
          pct    = NA_real_,
          mean   = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else mean(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          sd     = as.numeric(if (sum(!is.na(get(v))) <= 1) NA_real_ else sd(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          median = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else median(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          p25    = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else quantile(get(v), 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)),
          p75    = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else quantile(get(v), 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
        )]
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          group = "overall",
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "continuous",
          level = NA_character_
        )]
      }
      
      tmp <- tmp[, .(
        site, group, variable, variable_type, level,
        n, N, pct,
        mean, sd, median, p25, p75
      )]
      
      out_list[[paste0("cont_", v)]] <- tmp
    }
  }
  
  out <- rbindlist(out_list, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  
  setcolorder(out, c(
    "site", "group", "variable", "variable_type", "level",
    "n", "N", "pct", "mean", "sd", "median", "p25", "p75"
  ))
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CENSORING
  #-----------------------------#
  out[variable_type == "categorical" & n < 10,
      `:=`(pct = NA_real_)]
  out[variable_type == "categorical",
      n_censored := ifelse(!is.na(n) & n < 10, "<10", as.character(n))]
  out[variable_type == "categorical" & n < 10,
      n := NA_real_]
  
  out[variable_type == "continuous" & n < 10,
      `:=`(mean = NA_real_, sd = NA_real_, median = NA_real_,
           p25 = NA_real_, p75 = NA_real_)]
  out[variable_type == "continuous",
      n_censored := ifelse(!is.na(n) & n < 10, "<10", as.character(n))]
  out[variable_type == "continuous" & n < 10,
      n := NA_real_]

  #-----------------------------#
  # COMPLEMENTARY SUPPRESSION
  #-----------------------------#
  cat_out <- out[variable_type == "categorical"]
  if (nrow(cat_out) > 0) {
    suppressed_combos <- unique(cat_out[
      n_censored == "<10",
      .(variable, group)
    ])
    
    if (nrow(suppressed_combos) > 0) {
      suppressed_combos[, suppress_flag := TRUE]
      out <- merge(out, suppressed_combos, by = c("variable", "group"), all.x = TRUE)
      
      out[variable_type == "categorical" & !is.na(suppress_flag),
          `:=`(
            pct        = NA_real_,
            n_censored = ifelse(n_censored == "<10", "<10", "suppressed"),
            n          = NA_real_
          )]
      
      out[, suppress_flag := NULL]
    }
  }

  cont_out <- out[variable_type == "continuous"]
  if (nrow(cont_out) > 0) {
    suppressed_cont_vars <- cont_out[
      n_censored == "<10",
      unique(variable)
    ]
    
    if (length(suppressed_cont_vars) > 0) {
      out[variable_type == "continuous" & variable %in% suppressed_cont_vars,
          `:=`(
            mean       = NA_real_,
            sd         = NA_real_,
            median     = NA_real_,
            p25        = NA_real_,
            p75        = NA_real_,
            n_censored = ifelse(n_censored == "<10", "<10", "suppressed"),
            n          = NA_real_
          )]
    }
  }
  
  return(out[])
}

make_table1_comparisons <- function(dt, by, cont_vars = NULL, cat_vars = NULL,
                                    site_name = NA_character_, group_levels = NULL,
                                    reference_level = NULL, fisher_if_expected_lt5 = TRUE) {
  dt <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  
  if (!(by %in% names(dt))) stop(sprintf("Grouping variable '%s' not found in dt.", by))
  dt <- dt[!is.na(get(by))]
  dt[, (by) := as.character(get(by))]
  
  observed_groups <- unique(dt[[by]])
  observed_groups <- observed_groups[!is.na(observed_groups)]
  
  if (!is.null(reference_level)) {
    if (!reference_level %in% observed_groups)
      stop(sprintf("reference_level '%s' not found in data.", reference_level))
    ref <- reference_level
    comparators <- if (!is.null(group_levels)) group_levels[group_levels != ref] else sort(observed_groups[observed_groups != ref])
  } else {
    if (!is.null(group_levels)) {
      if (length(group_levels) != 2) stop("group_levels must have length 2.")
      ref <- group_levels[1]; comparators <- group_levels[2]
    } else {
      if (length(observed_groups) != 2)
        stop(sprintf("Found %s groups — supply reference_level for 3+ groups.", paste(observed_groups, collapse = ", ")))
      grps <- sort(observed_groups); ref <- grps[1]; comparators <- grps[2]
    }
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: multilevel categorical SMD
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  calc_multilevel_smd <- function(x, group, g1, g2) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = as.character(x), group = as.character(group))
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group) & group %in% c(g1, g2)]
    dsub[is.na(x), x := "missing"]
    levs <- sort(unique(dsub$x))
    if (length(levs) < 2) return(NA_real_)
    ref_lev <- levs[1]
    keep_levs <- levs[levs != ref_lev]
    make_indicator_matrix <- function(vals, levels_keep) {
      out <- sapply(levels_keep, function(lv) as.numeric(vals == lv))
      if (is.null(dim(out))) { out <- matrix(out, ncol = 1); colnames(out) <- levels_keep }
      out
    }
    x1 <- dsub[group == g1, x]; x2 <- dsub[group == g2, x]
    if (length(x1) < 2 || length(x2) < 2) return(NA_real_)
    M1 <- make_indicator_matrix(x1, keep_levs)
    M2 <- make_indicator_matrix(x2, keep_levs)
    p1 <- colMeans(M1); p2 <- colMeans(M2); d <- p2 - p1
    S1 <- stats::cov(M1); S2 <- stats::cov(M2)
    if (is.null(dim(S1))) S1 <- matrix(S1, nrow = 1, ncol = 1)
    if (is.null(dim(S2))) S2 <- matrix(S2, nrow = 1, ncol = 1)
    S_pooled <- (S1 + S2) / 2
    S_inv <- try(solve(S_pooled), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(S_inv, "try-error")) {
      if (!requireNamespace("MASS", quietly = TRUE)) return(NA_real_)
      S_inv <- try(MASS::ginv(S_pooled), silent = TRUE)
      if (inherits(S_inv, "try-error")) return(NA_real_)
    }
    as.numeric(sqrt(t(d) %*% S_inv %*% d))
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: continuous variable comparison
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  compare_continuous <- function(x, group, var_name, g1, g2, comparison_label) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = x, group = group)
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group)]
    
    x1 <- dsub[group == g1, x]
    x2 <- dsub[group == g2, x]
    x1_nonmiss <- x1[!is.na(x1)]
    x2_nonmiss <- x2[!is.na(x2)]
    
    n1 <- length(x1_nonmiss); n2 <- length(x2_nonmiss)
    mean1 <- if (n1 > 0) mean(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    mean2 <- if (n2 > 0) mean(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    sd1   <- if (n1 > 1) sd(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    sd2   <- if (n2 > 1) sd(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    med1  <- if (n1 > 0) median(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    med2  <- if (n2 > 0) median(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    p25_1 <- if (n1 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x1_nonmiss, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p25_2 <- if (n2 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x2_nonmiss, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p75_1 <- if (n1 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x1_nonmiss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p75_2 <- if (n2 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x2_nonmiss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    
    estimate <- NA_real_; ci_lower <- NA_real_
    ci_upper <- NA_real_; p_value  <- NA_real_
    test_used <- NA_character_
    
    if (n1 >= 2 && n2 >= 2) {
      tt <- try(t.test(x2_nonmiss, x1_nonmiss), silent = TRUE)
      if (!inherits(tt, "try-error")) {
        estimate  <- unname(mean2 - mean1)
        ci_lower  <- unname(tt$conf.int[1])
        ci_upper  <- unname(tt$conf.int[2])
        p_value   <- tt$p.value
        test_used <- "welch_t_test"
      }
    }
    
    pooled_sd <- NA_real_; smd <- NA_real_
    if (n1 >= 2 && n2 >= 2 && !is.na(sd1) && !is.na(sd2)) {
      pooled_sd <- sqrt(((n1 - 1) * sd1^2 + (n2 - 1) * sd2^2) / (n1 + n2 - 2))
      if (!is.na(pooled_sd) && pooled_sd > 0) smd <- (mean2 - mean1) / pooled_sd
    }
    
    data.table(
      site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "continuous",
      comparison = comparison_label, level = NA_character_,
      group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
      group1_mean = mean1, group2_mean = mean2,
      group1_sd = sd1, group2_sd = sd2,
      group1_median = med1, group2_median = med2,
      group1_p25 = p25_1, group2_p25 = p25_2,
      group1_p75 = p75_1, group2_p75 = p75_2,
      statistic = "mean_difference", estimate = estimate,
      ci_lower = ci_lower, ci_upper = ci_upper, p_value = p_value,
      smd = smd, effect_measure = "mean_difference",
      test = test_used, note = NA_character_
    )
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: categorical variable comparison
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  compare_categorical <- function(x, group, var_name, g1, g2, comparison_label) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = x, group = group)
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group)]
    dsub[, x := as.character(x)]
    dsub[is.na(x), x := "missing"]
    
    tab <- table(dsub$x, dsub$group)
    needed_cols <- c(g1, g2)
    if (!all(needed_cols %in% colnames(tab))) {
      full_tab <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(tab), ncol = 2,
                         dimnames = list(rownames(tab), needed_cols))
      common_cols <- intersect(colnames(tab), needed_cols)
      full_tab[, common_cols] <- tab[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]
      tab <- full_tab
    } else {
      tab <- tab[, needed_cols, drop = FALSE]
    }
    
    n_levels <- nrow(tab)
    n1 <- sum(tab[, g1])
    n2 <- sum(tab[, g2])
    
    overall_smd <- calc_multilevel_smd(dsub$x, dsub$group, g1, g2)
    
    p_value <- NA_real_; test_used <- NA_character_
    if (n_levels >= 1) {
      chisq_try <- try(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE), silent = TRUE)
      if (!inherits(chisq_try, "try-error")) {
        expected <- chisq_try$expected
        if (fisher_if_expected_lt5 && any(expected < 5)) {
          fisher_try <- try(fisher.test(tab), silent = TRUE)
          if (!inherits(fisher_try, "try-error")) {
            p_value <- fisher_try$p.value; test_used <- "fisher_exact"
          } else {
            p_value <- chisq_try$p.value; test_used <- "chi_square"
          }
        } else {
          p_value <- chisq_try$p.value; test_used <- "chi_square"
        }
      }
    }
    
    out <- data.table(
      site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "categorical",
      comparison = comparison_label, level = NA_character_,
      group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
      group1_mean = NA_real_, group2_mean = NA_real_,
      group1_sd = NA_real_, group2_sd = NA_real_,
      group1_median = NA_real_, group2_median = NA_real_,
      group1_p25 = NA_real_, group2_p25 = NA_real_,
      group1_p75 = NA_real_, group2_p75 = NA_real_,
      statistic = "overall_difference", estimate = NA_real_,
      ci_lower = NA_real_, ci_upper = NA_real_, p_value = p_value,
      smd = overall_smd, effect_measure = "categorical_smd",
      test = test_used, note = NA_character_
    )
    
    if (n_levels == 2) {
      levels_x <- rownames(tab)
      ref_level <- levels_x[1]; target_level <- levels_x[2]
      a <- as.numeric(tab[target_level, g2])
      b <- as.numeric(tab[ref_level,   g2])
      c <- as.numeric(tab[target_level, g1])
      d <- as.numeric(tab[ref_level,   g1])
      p1 <- if ((c + d) > 0) c / (c + d) else NA_real_
      p2 <- if ((a + b) > 0) a / (a + b) else NA_real_
      rd <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2)) p2 - p1 else NA_real_
      rd_se <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2) && (c + d) > 0 && (a + b) > 0)
        sqrt((p1 * (1 - p1) / (c + d)) + (p2 * (1 - p2) / (a + b))) else NA_real_
      rd_lcl <- if (!is.na(rd_se)) rd - 1.96 * rd_se else NA_real_
      rd_ucl <- if (!is.na(rd_se)) rd + 1.96 * rd_se else NA_real_
      pooled_p <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2)) (p1 + p2) / 2 else NA_real_
      smd_binary <- if (!is.na(pooled_p) && pooled_p > 0 && pooled_p < 1)
        (p2 - p1) / sqrt(pooled_p * (1 - pooled_p)) else NA_real_
      
      out_rd <- data.table(
        site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "categorical",
        comparison = comparison_label, level = target_level,
        group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
        group1_mean = p1, group2_mean = p2,
        group1_sd = NA_real_, group2_sd = NA_real_,
        group1_median = NA_real_, group2_median = NA_real_,
        group1_p25 = NA_real_, group2_p25 = NA_real_,
        group1_p75 = NA_real_, group2_p75 = NA_real_,
        statistic = "risk_difference", estimate = rd,
        ci_lower = rd_lcl, ci_upper = rd_ucl, p_value = p_value,
        smd = smd_binary, effect_measure = "risk_difference",
        test = test_used,
        note = sprintf("Binary categorical variable. level='%s' treated as event.", target_level)
      )
      out <- rbind(out, out_rd, fill = TRUE)
      
    } else if (n_levels > 2) {
      out[, note := "Multi-level categorical variable: overall p-value and omnibus SMD reported; CI not populated."]
    }
    
    out
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Loop over pairwise comparisons
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  all_comparisons <- lapply(comparators, function(comp) {
    g1 <- ref
    g2 <- comp
    comparison_label <- paste0(by, ": ", g2, " vs ", g1)
    dt_pair <- dt[get(by) %in% c(g1, g2)]
    out_list <- list()
    
    if (!is.null(cont_vars)) {
      for (v in cont_vars) {
        if (!(v %in% names(dt_pair))) { warning(sprintf("'%s' not found. Skipping.", v)); next }
        out_list[[paste0("cont_", v)]] <- compare_continuous(dt_pair[[v]], dt_pair[[by]], v, g1, g2, comparison_label)
      }
    }
    
    if (!is.null(cat_vars)) {
      for (v in cat_vars) {
        if (!(v %in% names(dt_pair))) { warning(sprintf("'%s' not found. Skipping.", v)); next }
        out_list[[paste0("cat_", v)]] <- compare_categorical(dt_pair[[v]], dt_pair[[by]], v, g1, g2, comparison_label)
      }
    }
    
    rbindlist(out_list, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  })

  out <- rbindlist(all_comparisons, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CENSORING
  #-----------------------------#
  # Add censored count columns before suppressing raw values
  out[, group1_n_censored := ifelse(group1_n < 10, "<10", as.character(group1_n))]
  out[, group2_n_censored := ifelse(group2_n < 10, "<10", as.character(group2_n))]
  
  # Suppress all statistics when either group is below threshold
  out[group1_n < 10 | group2_n < 10,
      `:=`(
        estimate      = NA_real_,
        ci_lower      = NA_real_,
        ci_upper      = NA_real_,
        p_value       = NA_real_,
        smd           = NA_real_,
        group1_mean   = NA_real_,
        group2_mean   = NA_real_,
        group1_sd     = NA_real_,
        group2_sd     = NA_real_,
        group1_median = NA_real_,
        group2_median = NA_real_,
        group1_p25    = NA_real_,
        group2_p25    = NA_real_,
        group1_p75    = NA_real_,
        group2_p75    = NA_real_,
        note          = "Suppressed: cell size < 10"
      )]
  
  # Suppress raw counts after creating censored versions
  out[group1_n < 10, group1_n := NA_real_]
  out[group2_n < 10, group2_n := NA_real_]

  #-----------------------------#
  # COMPLEMENTARY SUPPRESSION
  #-----------------------------#
  # In the comparisons table, the structure is one row per variable-comparison pair
  # (not per level), so if either group_n is suppressed we suppress the whole
  # variable-comparison combination, which the censoring block above already does.
  # The additional step here suppresses variables entirely if they appear in ANY
  # suppressed comparison, preventing back-calculation across comparisons.

  suppressed_vars <- out[
    group1_n_censored == "<10" | group2_n_censored == "<10",
    unique(variable)
  ]

  if (length(suppressed_vars) > 0) {
    out[variable %in% suppressed_vars,
        `:=`(
          estimate      = NA_real_,
          ci_lower      = NA_real_,
          ci_upper      = NA_real_,
          p_value       = NA_real_,
          smd           = NA_real_,
          group1_mean   = NA_real_,
          group2_mean   = NA_real_,
          group1_sd     = NA_real_,
          group2_sd     = NA_real_,
          group1_median = NA_real_,
          group2_median = NA_real_,
          group1_p25    = NA_real_,
          group2_p25    = NA_real_,
          group1_p75    = NA_real_,
          group2_p75    = NA_real_,
          group1_n_censored = ifelse(group1_n_censored == "<10", "<10", "suppressed"),
          group2_n_censored = ifelse(group2_n_censored == "<10", "<10", "suppressed"),
          group1_n      = NA_real_,
          group2_n      = NA_real_,
          note          = ifelse(
            is.na(note) | note == "",
            "Suppressed: complementary cell size < 10",
            note
          )
        )]
  }

  desired_order <- c(
    "site", "variable", "variable_type", "comparison", "level",
    "group1", "group2", "group1_n", "group1_n_censored",
    "group2_n", "group2_n_censored",
    "group1_mean", "group2_mean", "group1_sd", "group2_sd",
    "group1_median", "group2_median", "group1_p25", "group2_p25",
    "group1_p75", "group2_p75",
    "statistic", "estimate", "ci_lower", "ci_upper",
    "p_value", "smd", "effect_measure", "test", "note"
  )
  existing_order <- desired_order[desired_order %in% names(out)]
  setcolorder(out, existing_order)
  
  return(out[])
}
```

# Function to Extract Model Information for CSVs
```{r}
# Helper function to extract model results safely
extract_lm_results <- function(model) {
  coef_table <- summary(model)$coefficients
  data.frame(
    term      = rownames(coef_table),
    estimate  = coef_table[, "Estimate"],
    std.error = coef_table[, "Std. Error"],
    variance  = coef_table[, "Std. Error"]^2,
    p.value   = coef_table[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
}

extract_glm_results <- function(model) {
  coef_table <- summary(model)$coefficients
  odds_ratios <- exp(coef_table[, "Estimate"])
  data.frame(
    Variable  = rownames(coef_table),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = coef_table[, "Std. Error"],
    Variance  = coef_table[, "Std. Error"]^2,
    P_Value   = coef_table[, "Pr(>|z|)"]
  )
}
```

#IPW Calculation for 48-hours of observation
```{r}
ipw_outcome <- total_cohort[, .(
  reached_48h = as.integer(imv_duration_hours_final >= 48)
), by = hospitalization_id]

# Merge the reached_48h flag back to your dataset
ipw_sensitivity_analysis <- merge(total_cohort, ipw_outcome, by = "hospitalization_id")

# Use patient-level covariates to predict censoring
ipw_model <- glm(reached_48h ~ age_at_admission + sex_category + race_category + ethnicity_category + laps2 + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + factor(observation_year),
                 data = unique(ipw_sensitivity_analysis, by = "hospitalization_id"),
                 family = binomial())

total_cohort[, prob_reach_48h := predict(ipw_model, newdata = total_cohort, type = "response")]
total_cohort[, ipw := 1 / prob_reach_48h]
```

# Build Language Categorizations
```{r}
# 1: English v Non-English
total_cohort[, lang_cat_1 := fifelse(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  fifelse(!is.na(language_category), "non-english", NA_character_)
)]

# 2: English v Spanish v all other non-English
total_cohort[, lang_cat_2 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  !is.na(language_category), "other non-english",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 3: English v Spanish v third most frequent hospital system wide language - all others NA
# Define third_lang
third_lang <- language_data[
  !trimws(tolower(language_category)) %in% c("english", "spanish", "unknown or na"),
  language_category
][1]

# Define the variable
total_cohort[, lang_cat_3 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category == third_lang, third_lang,
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 4: English v Spanish v Chinese v Vietnamese (three non-English languages with the most evidence supporting the existence of health disparities) - all others NA
total_cohort[, lang_cat_4 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category == "chinese", "chinese",
  language_category == "vietnamese", "vietnamese",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 5: English v Spanish v Broad Regional Groupings
# South Asian, East Asian, Southeast Asian, Sub-Saharan African, non-colonial European
# Others that do not fit are NA

# -----------------------------
# Define language groupings
# -----------------------------

south_asian_langs <- c(
  "gujarati",
  "hindi",
  "urdu",
  "punjabi",
  "bengali",
  "nepali, marathi, or other indic languages",
  "telugu",
  "tamil",
  "malayalam, kannada, or other dravidian languages"
)

east_asian_langs <- c(
  "chinese",
  "japanese",
  "korean"
)

southeast_asian_langs <- c(
  "vietnamese",
  "khmer",
  "thai, lao, or other tai-kadai languages"
)

other_asian_langs <- c(
  "other languages of asia",
  "tagalog",
  "ilocano, samoan, hawaiian, or other austronesian languages"
)

sub_saharan_african_langs <- c(
  "amharic, somali, or other afro-asiatic languages",
  "yoruba, twi, igbo, or other languages of western africa",
  "swahili or other languages of central, eastern, and southern africa"
)

continental_european_langs <- c(
  "german",
  "greek",
  "russian",
  "polish",
  "italian",
  "serbo-croatian",
  "ukrainian or other slavic languages",
  "yiddish, pennsylvania dutch, or other west germanic languages",
  "other european indo-european languages")
  
mena_langs <- c(
  "arabic",
  "persian",
  "hebrew",
  "armenian"
)

all_other_langs <- c(
  "french",
  "haitian creole",
  "portuguese",
  "other asian indo-european languages",
  "navajo",
  "other native languages of north america",
  "other and unspecified languages"
)

total_cohort[, lang_cat_5 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category %in% south_asian_langs, "south_asian",
  language_category %in% east_asian_langs, "east_asian",
  language_category %in% southeast_asian_langs, "southeast_asian",
  language_category %in% sub_saharan_african_langs, "sub_saharan_african",
  language_category %in% continental_european_langs, "continental_european_langs",
  language_category %in% mena_langs, "mena",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 6: English v Spanish - all others NA
total_cohort[, lang_cat_6 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# Broad Regional without "other_asian" and "all_other_langs" groups?
total_cohort[, lang_cat_7 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category %in% south_asian_langs, "south_asian",
  language_category %in% east_asian_langs, "east_asian",
  language_category %in% southeast_asian_langs, "southeast_asian",
  language_category %in% other_asian_langs, "other_asian",
  language_category %in% sub_saharan_african_langs, "sub_saharan_african",
  language_category %in% continental_european_langs, "continental_european_langs",
  language_category %in% mena_langs, "mena",
  language_category %in% all_other_langs, "all_other_langs",
  default = NA_character_
)]

```


# SEDATION PROJECT
# Step 1: Total Cohort for Non-English & Spanish + Non-English Analysis
```{r}
# Identify reference points for model
total_cohort$language_category <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$language_category), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_4 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_4), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english")
total_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
total_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
total_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
total_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
################################################################################
# Eng v Non-Eng
################################################################################
table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = total_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_1", site_name = institution
)
fwrite(table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_descriptive,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_1_descriptive.csv")))

table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution
)
fwrite(table1_english_v_nonenglish_cohort_comparisons,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_1_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1 <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = total_cohort)
  summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_1.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1 model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Eng v Spanish v Other Non-Eng
################################################################################
table1_english_v_spanish_v_nonenglish_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = total_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_2", site_name = institution
)
fwrite(table1_english_v_spanish_v_nonenglish_cohort_descriptive,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_2_descriptive.csv")))

table1_english_v_spanish_v_nonenglish_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution
)
fwrite(table1_english_v_spanish_v_nonenglish_cohort_comparisons,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_2_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2 <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_2 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = total_cohort)
  summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_2.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2 model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Eng v Spanish v Broad Regional Language Groups Including Everyone
################################################################################
table1_lang_cat_7_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = total_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_7", site_name = institution
)
fwrite(table1_lang_cat_7_cohort_descriptive,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_7_descriptive.csv")))

table1_lang_cat_7_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution
)
fwrite(table1_lang_cat_7_cohort_comparisons,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_total_cohort_lang_cat_7_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7 <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_7 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = total_cohort)
  summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_7.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7 model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})
```

# Step 2: English + Spanish + Most Frequent non-spanish/non-english

```{r}
lang_cat_3_cohort <- total_cohort[!is.na(lang_cat_3)]
```

# Step 4: Broad Regional Language Groupings
```{r}
lang_cat_5_cohort <- total_cohort[!is.na(lang_cat_5)]
lang_cat_5_cohort$language_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$language_category), ref = "english")
lang_cat_5_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english")
lang_cat_5_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_5_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_5_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
lang_cat_5_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

table1_lang_cat_5_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = lang_cat_5_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_5", site_name = institution
)
fwrite(table1_lang_cat_5_descriptive,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_cohort_lang_cat_5_descriptive.csv")))

table1_lang_cat_5_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = lang_cat_5_cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution
)
fwrite(table1_lang_cat_5_cohort_comparisons,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_cohort_lang_cat_5_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5 <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_5 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_5_cohort)
  summary(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_5.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5 model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})
```

# Step 5: Defining the primary cohort, primary analysis, secondary analyses, sensitivity analyses, exploratory analyses
```{r}
primary_cohort_all_icus <- total_cohort[!is.na(lang_cat_6)]
primary_cohort_all_icus$language_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$language_category), ref = "english")
primary_cohort_all_icus$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
primary_cohort_all_icus$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$sex_category), ref = "male")
primary_cohort_all_icus$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$race_category), ref = "white")
primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

primary_cohort_all_icus_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = primary_cohort_all_icus, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution
)
fwrite(primary_cohort_all_icus_descriptive,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_primary_cohort_all_icus_descriptive.csv")))

primary_cohort_all_icus_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = primary_cohort_all_icus, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution
)
fwrite(primary_cohort_all_icus_comparisons,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_primary_cohort_all_icus_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort_all_icus)
  summary(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_primary_all_icus.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Define Primary Cohort
################################################################################
spanish_counts <- primary_cohort_all_icus[lang_cat_6 == "spanish", .N, by = hospital_icu_id]
all_hospitals <- unique(primary_cohort_all_icus$hospital_icu_id)
hospitals_with_spanish <- spanish_counts$hospital_icu_id
hospitals_to_remove <- setdiff(all_hospitals, hospitals_with_spanish)
primary_cohort <- primary_cohort_all_icus[!hospital_icu_id %in% hospitals_to_remove]

primary_cohort$language_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$language_category), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_4 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_4), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
primary_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
primary_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
primary_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
primary_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
primary_cohort$continuous_nmba_48 <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$continuous_nmba_48), ref = "0")

################################################################################
# Primary Cohort - Table 1s
################################################################################
primary_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(
  dt = primary_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars,
  by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution
)
fwrite(primary_cohort_descriptive,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_primary_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

primary_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(
  dt = primary_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution
)
fwrite(primary_cohort_comparisons,
       file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_primary_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

# Ethnicity and Race Counts by Language Group
spanish_race_counts <- primary_cohort[lang_cat_6 == "spanish", .N, by = race_category]
spanish_ethnicity_counts <- primary_cohort[lang_cat_6 == "spanish", .N, by = ethnicity_category]
spanish_race_counts[, N_censored := ifelse(N < 10, "<10", as.character(N))]
spanish_ethnicity_counts[, N_censored := ifelse(N < 10, "<10", as.character(N))]
spanish_race_counts[, N := NULL]
spanish_ethnicity_counts[, N := NULL]
fwrite(spanish_race_counts, file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_spanish_race_cell_counts.csv")))
fwrite(spanish_ethnicity_counts, file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_spanish_ethnicity_cell_counts.csv")))

################################################################################
# Primary Analysis - Unadjusted and Adjusted
################################################################################
tryCatch({
  primary_model_unadjusted <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6, data = primary_cohort)
  summary(primary_model_unadjusted)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(primary_model_unadjusted),
         file.path(sedation_final_data, paste0(institution, "_primary_model_unadjusted.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping primary_model_unadjusted model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

tryCatch({
  primary_model_adjusted <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)
  summary(primary_model_adjusted)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(primary_model_adjusted),
         file.path(sedation_final_data, paste0(institution, "_primary_model_adjusted.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping primary_model_adjusted model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})
summary(primary_model_adjusted)
################################################################################
# Secondary Analyses
################################################################################
tryCatch({
  secondary_model_vfd <- lm(vent_free_days_28 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + sex_category + bmi + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = primary_cohort)
  summary(secondary_model_vfd)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_vfd),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_vfd.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {

  summary(secondary_model_imv_time)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_imv_time),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_imv_time.csv")))
```

# Step 6: Sensitivity and Sub-Group Analyses That Require Filtering Primary Cohort
```{r}
################################################################################
# Hispanic Sub-Group Analysis
################################################################################
hispanic_cohort <- primary_cohort[ethnicity_category == "hispanic"]
hispanic_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(hispanic_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
hispanic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(hispanic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
hispanic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(hispanic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")

hispanic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = hispanic_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution)
fwrite(hispanic_cohort_descriptive, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_hispanic_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

hispanic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = hispanic_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(hispanic_cohort_comparisons, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_hispanic_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  subgroup_model_hispanic <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = hispanic_cohort)
  summary(subgroup_model_hispanic)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_hispanic),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_hispanic.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping subgroup_model_hispanic model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Non-Hispanic Sub-Group Analysis
################################################################################
non_hispanic_cohort <- primary_cohort[ethnicity_category == "non-hispanic"]
non_hispanic_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(non_hispanic_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
non_hispanic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(non_hispanic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
non_hispanic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(non_hispanic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")

non_hispanic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = non_hispanic_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution)
fwrite(non_hispanic_cohort_descriptive, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_non_hispanic_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

non_hispanic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = non_hispanic_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(non_hispanic_cohort_comparisons, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_non_hispanic_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  subgroup_model_non_hispanic <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = non_hispanic_cohort)
  summary(subgroup_model_non_hispanic)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_non_hispanic),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_non_hispanic.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping non_hispanic subgroup model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# MICU Sub-Group Analysis
################################################################################
micu_cohort <- primary_cohort[icu_imv == "medical_icu"]
micu_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(micu_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
micu_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(micu_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
micu_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(micu_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")

micu_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = micu_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution)
fwrite(micu_cohort_descriptive, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_micu_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

micu_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = micu_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(micu_cohort_comparisons, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_micu_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

# Dynamic formula — drop zero-variance factors
tryCatch({
  base_rhs <- c("lang_cat_6", "race_category", "age_category", "bmi",
                "sex_category", "factor(hospital_icu_id)", "elixhauser_score",
                "SVM_SCORE", "laps2", "factor(observation_year)")
  n_levels <- function(x) length(unique(x[!is.na(x)]))
  drop <- character(0)
  if (n_levels(micu_cohort$hospital_icu_id)  < 2) drop <- c(drop, "factor(hospital_icu_id)")
  if (n_levels(micu_cohort$observation_year) < 2) drop <- c(drop, "factor(observation_year)")
  if (n_levels(micu_cohort$lang_cat_6)       < 2) {
    warning("lang_cat_6 has <2 levels in MICU cohort — skipping MICU model")
    subgroup_model_micu_cohort <- NULL
  } else {
    rhs <- setdiff(base_rhs, drop)
    if (length(drop)) message("MICU model: dropping zero-variance term(s): ", paste(drop, collapse = ", "))
    f <- reformulate(rhs, response = "percent_deep_sedation_48")
    subgroup_model_micu_cohort <- lm(f, data = micu_cohort)
  }

  if (!is.null(subgroup_model_micu_cohort)) {
    summary(subgroup_model_micu_cohort)
    fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_micu_cohort),
           file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_micu.csv")))
  }
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping subgroup_model_micu_cohort model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

arf_cohort <- primary_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE]

         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_no_cont_nmba_cohort model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Only Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
only_cont_nmba_cohort <- primary_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 1]
only_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(only_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
only_cont_nmba_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(only_cont_nmba_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
only_cont_nmba_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(only_cont_nmba_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")

only_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = only_cont_nmba_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution)
fwrite(only_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_only_cont_nmba_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

only_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = only_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(only_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_only_cont_nmba_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_only_cont_nmba_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = only_cont_nmba_cohort)
  summary(sensitivity_model_only_cont_nmba_cohort)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_only_cont_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_only_cont_nmba.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_only_cont_nmba_cohort model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Ethnicity Reclassification
################################################################################
ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- copy(primary_cohort)
ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "unknown" & language_category == "spanish", ethnicity_category := "hispanic"]
ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "unknown" & language_category == "english", ethnicity_category := "non-hispanic"]
ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "non-hispanic" & language_category == "spanish", ethnicity_category := "hispanic"]
ethnicity_reclass_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
ethnicity_reclass_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
ethnicity_reclass_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
ethnicity_reclass_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

ethnicity_reclass_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = ethnicity_reclass_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution)
fwrite(ethnicity_reclass_cohort_descriptive, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_reclass_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

ethnicity_reclass_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = ethnicity_reclass_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(ethnicity_reclass_cohort_comparisons, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_ethnicity_reclass_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = ethnicity_reclass_cohort)
  summary(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_ethnicity_reclass.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Remove Unknown Ethnicity
################################################################################
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort <- primary_cohort[ethnicity_category != "unknown"]
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution)
fwrite(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_descriptive, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_comparisons, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort <- lm(percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + ethnicity_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)
  summary(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_no_unknown_ethnicity.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})

################################################################################
# Full 48 Hours - IPW Weighted with Sandwich SEs
# NOTE: extract_lm_results() is NOT used here because coeftest() returns a
# matrix, not an lm object. The sandwich SE extraction is kept as-is.
################################################################################
full_48hr_cohort <- primary_cohort[hours_mechanically_ventilated_72 >= 48]
full_48hr_cohort <- full_48hr_cohort[is.finite(ipw) & !is.na(ipw)]
ipw_q <- quantile(full_48hr_cohort$ipw, c(0.01, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)
full_48hr_cohort[, ipw := pmin(pmax(ipw, ipw_q[1]), ipw_q[2])]
full_48hr_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(full_48hr_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")
full_48hr_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(full_48hr_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
full_48hr_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(full_48hr_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")

full_48hr_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = full_48hr_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_6", site_name = institution)
fwrite(full_48hr_cohort_descriptive, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_full_48hr_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

full_48hr_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = full_48hr_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort_comparisons, file.path(sedation_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_full_48hr_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  sensitivity_model_full_48 <- lm(
    percent_deep_sedation_48 ~ lang_cat_6 + race_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + SVM_SCORE + laps2 + factor(observation_year),
    data = full_48hr_cohort, weights = ipw
  )
  
  robust_se <- tryCatch(
    vcovHC(sensitivity_model_full_48, type = "HC3"),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(robust_se) || anyNA(robust_se)) {
    warning("HC3 robust SE failed at this site; falling back to HC0.")
    robust_se <- vcovHC(sensitivity_model_full_48, type = "HC0")
  }
  
  sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich <- coeftest(sensitivity_model_full_48, vcov = robust_se)
  print(sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich)
  
  sensitivity_model_full_48_results <- data.frame(
    term      = rownames(sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich),
    estimate  = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Estimate"],
    std.error = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Std. Error"],
    variance  = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Std. Error"]^2,
    p.value   = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
  fwrite(sensitivity_model_full_48_results,
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_full_48hr.csv")))
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Skipping sensitivity_model_full_48 model: ", conditionMessage(e))
})
```

# Step 7: Cohort Cleaning Summary from Analysis
```{r}
# Step 0: initial count
n_start <- nrow(total_cohort)

# Step 1: Removed for speaking languages other than English or Spanish
n_after_step1 <- nrow(primary_cohort_all_icus)
n_removed_step1 <- n_start - n_after_step1

# Step 2: Removed for being admitted to ICUs without Spanish speakers
n_after_step2 <- nrow(primary_cohort)
n_removed_step2 <- n_after_step1 - n_after_step2

# Tabulation of exclusions
filter_tab_sedation_project <- data.table(
  step = c(
    "Total IMV Patients",
    "Removed for language other than English or Spanish",
    "Removed for admission to ICU without Spanish speakers",
    "Final"
  ),
  n_remaining = c(
    n_start,
    n_after_step1,
    n_after_step2,
    n_after_step2
  ),
  n_removed_this_step = c(
    0,
    n_removed_step1,
    n_removed_step2,
    0
  )
)

filter_tab_sedation_project

fwrite(filter_tab_sedation_project, 
       file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_01_analysis_cleaning_summary.csv")))
```

# Step 2: ARF Sub-Groups - Odds of Continuous NMBAs for Different Language Groups
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_1 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort <- total_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE]
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english")
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

lang_cat_1_arf_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_1", site_name = institution)
fwrite(lang_cat_1_arf_cohort_descriptive, file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_1_arf_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

lang_cat_1_arf_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(lang_cat_1_arf_cohort_comparisons, file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_1_arf_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
  summary(arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas)
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf.csv")))
}, error = function(e) { message("lang_cat_1 ARF paralysis model failed: ", conditionMessage(e)) })

################################################################################
# lang_cat_2 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_2_arf_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_2", site_name = institution)
fwrite(lang_cat_2_arf_cohort_descriptive, file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_2_arf_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

lang_cat_2_arf_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(lang_cat_2_arf_cohort_comparisons, file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_2_arf_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_2 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
  summary(arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas)
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_2_arf.csv")))
}, error = function(e) { message("lang_cat_2 ARF paralysis model failed: ", conditionMessage(e)) })

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 3 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_3_arf_cohort <- lang_cat_3_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE]
lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english")
lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

lang_cat_3_arf_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = lang_cat_3_arf_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_3", site_name = institution)
fwrite(lang_cat_3_arf_cohort_descriptive, file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_3_arf_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

lang_cat_3_arf_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = lang_cat_3_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(lang_cat_3_arf_cohort_comparisons, file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_3_arf_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({

  summary(arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas)
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_3_arf.csv")))
}, error = function(e) { message("lang_cat_3 ARF paralysis model failed: ", conditionMessage(e)) })
```

# Step 3: Non-ARF Cohort - Odds of continuous NMBAs
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_1 - Only non-ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort <- total_cohort[arf_flag == FALSE]
lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")

lang_cat_1_non_arf_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)

  non_arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_7 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
  summary(non_arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas)
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(non_arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_7_non_arf.csv")))
}, error = function(e) { message("lang_cat_7 non-ARF paralysis model failed: ", conditionMessage(e)) })
```

# Step 4: ARF Pre-Pandemic, Pandemic, and Endemic for lang_cat_1, 5, 6, 7
```{r}
################################################################################
# Lang_cat_1 ARF - Pre-Pandemic
################################################################################
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort <- lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort[admission_dttm < as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00")]
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$sex_category), ref = "male")
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$race_category), ref = "white")
lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive <- make_table1_federated(dt = lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = "lang_cat_1", site_name = institution)
fwrite(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive, file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_descriptive.csv")))

lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons <- make_table1_comparisons(dt = lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english", cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = institution)
fwrite(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons, file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_table1_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort_comparisons.csv")))

tryCatch({
  lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas <- glm(continuous_nmba_48 ~ lang_cat_1 + race_category + ethnicity_category + age_category + bmi + sex_category + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + laps2 + factor(observation_year), data = lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
  summary(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas)
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic.csv")))
}, error = function(e) { message("lang_cat_1 ARF pre-pandemic model failed: ", conditionMessage(e)) })
```
