```{r}
  model = c("Proportion of Time Deep Sedation (48hr)", "Total Hours Deep Sedation (48hr)",
            "Median RASS (Continuous)", "Median RASS (Binary)",
            "Time-Weighted RASS (Continuous)", "Time-Weighted RASS (Binary, <= -3)",
            "Sedation Index Score", "Reference Model"),
  pseudo_r_squared_mcfadden = c(pseudo_r_squared_one, pseudo_r_squared_two, pseudo_r_squared_three,
                                pseudo_r_squared_four, pseudo_r_squared_five, pseudo_r_squared_six,
                                pseudo_r_squared_seven, pseudo_r_squared_reference_model_reintubation),
  lrt_chi_sq  = c(lrt_one$Deviance[2], lrt_two$Deviance[2], lrt_three$Deviance[2],
                  lrt_four$Deviance[2], lrt_five$Deviance[2], lrt_six$Deviance[2],
                  lrt_seven$Deviance[2], NA),
  lrt_p_value = c(lrt_one$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], lrt_two$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], lrt_three$`Pr(>Chi)`[2],
                  lrt_four$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], lrt_five$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], lrt_six$`Pr(>Chi)`[2],
                  lrt_seven$`Pr(>Chi)`[2], NA)
)

# Save the results to a file
fwrite(reintubation_pseudo_r_squared_lrt_table, file.path(measurements_final_data, paste0(institution, "_reintubation_models_pseudo_r_squared_table.csv")))

```

# Step 8: Data Cleaning Summary
```{r}
# Step 0: initial count
n_start <- nrow(total_cohort)

# Step 1: Remove Patients intubated for less than 24 hours
n_after_step1 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort_24)
n_removed_step1 <- n_start - n_after_step1

# Step 2: remove neuro, neurosurg, neuro mixed patients
n_after_step2 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort_no_neuro)
n_removed_step2 <- n_after_step1 - n_after_step2

# Step 3: remove patients who received continuous or push paralytics
n_after_step3 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort)
n_removed_step3 <- n_after_step2 - n_after_step3

# Tabulation of exclusions
filter_tab_measurements_project <- data.table(
  step = c(
    "Total IMV Patients",
    "Removed for IMV duration < 24 hours",
    "Removed for admission to neuro ICU",
    "Removed for receiving continuous or push paralytics",
    "Final"
  ),
  n_remaining = c(
    n_start,
    n_after_step1,
    n_after_step2,
    n_after_step3,
    n_after_step3
  ),
  n_removed_this_step = c(
    0,
    n_removed_step1,
    n_removed_step2,
    n_removed_step3,
    0
  )
)

filter_tab_measurements_project

fwrite(filter_tab_measurements_project, 
       file.path(measurements_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_01_analysis_cleaning_summary.csv")))

```
  
# Eval for RUSH
# Diagnostic: Why did the language effect on % deep sedation go null?
```{r diagnostic-language-shift}
################################################################################
# DIAGNOSTIC: Language effect on % deep sedation
#
# Tests four hypotheses for why the new pipeline produced a near-null effect of
# preferred language on percent deep sedation while the absolute count
# (deep_sedation_count_total_48) remained meaningful:
#
#   1. Inclusion criteria broadening (IMV >= 24h -> IMV >= 4h) added short-
#      duration patients who dilute the percent.
#   2. Missing paralytic-period RASS scrubbing in the new code inflates the
#      denominator with non-deep-sedation hours that are clinically implausible.
#   3. Adjusting for observation_year in the new model absorbs the language
#      signal.
#   4. Hour 4 boundary handling differs between codes (> 4 vs >= 4), changing
#      denominators for short-duration patients.
#
# Outputs are written to a new "sedation_diagnostic" subfolder of the sedation
# project for easy comparison.
################################################################################

# ---- Folder for diagnostic outputs ----
sedation_diagnostic <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "diagnostic_language_shift/")
dir.create(sedation_diagnostic, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Use the same primary cohort the main analysis uses
diag_cohort <- copy(primary_cohort)

# Convenience flag for diagnostic stratification
diag_cohort[, lang_2 := fifelse(lang_cat_6 == "english", "english", "spanish")]

# Reuse the same RHS the primary model uses (without lang_cat_6 — added per call)
covariates_full <- c(
  "race_category",
  "age_category",
  "sex_category",
  "bmi",
  "factor(hospital_icu_id)",
  "elixhauser_score",
  "SVM_SCORE",
  "laps2",
  "factor(observation_year)"
)

# Same RHS but without observation_year for hypothesis 3
covariates_no_year <- setdiff(covariates_full, "factor(observation_year)")

fit_pct_model <- function(outcome, data, covars) {
  fml <- as.formula(paste(
    outcome, "~ lang_cat_6 +", paste(covars, collapse = " + ")
  ))
  tryCatch(lm(fml, data = data), error = function(e) {
    message("  model failed: ", conditionMessage(e)); NULL
  })
}

extract_lang_rows <- function(model, label) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
  res <- extract_lm_results(model)
  res <- res[grepl("lang_cat_6", res$term), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(res) == 0) return(NULL)
  res$scenario <- label
  res$n_obs    <- length(model$residuals)
  res
}

# Helper: censor cells with n<10 before writing
censor_n <- function(dt, cols) {
  for (c in cols) {
    if (c %in% names(dt)) {
      dt[, (paste0(c, "_censored")) := fifelse(get(c) < 10, "<10",
                                               as.character(get(c)))]
      dt[get(c) < 10, (c) := NA_integer_]
    }
  }
  dt
}

################################################################################
# 1. IMV duration distribution overall and by language
################################################################################
diag_cohort[, imv_bin := cut(
  imv_duration_hours_final,
  breaks = c(0, 12, 24, 48, 72, Inf),
  right  = FALSE,
  include.lowest = TRUE
)]

imv_dist_overall <- diag_cohort[, .N, by = imv_bin][order(imv_bin)]
imv_dist_by_lang <- dcast(
  diag_cohort[, .N, by = .(imv_bin, lang_2)],
  imv_bin ~ lang_2, value.var = "N", fill = 0
)[order(imv_bin)]

imv_dist_overall <- censor_n(imv_dist_overall, "N")
imv_dist_by_lang <- censor_n(imv_dist_by_lang, c("english", "spanish"))

fwrite(imv_dist_overall,
       file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                 paste0(institution, "_diag_imv_distribution_overall.csv")))
fwrite(imv_dist_by_lang,
       file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                 paste0(institution, "_diag_imv_distribution_by_language.csv")))

################################################################################
# 2. Hypothesis 3: model with vs without observation_year (cheapest test)
################################################################################
mod_with_year <- fit_pct_model("percent_deep_sedation_48", diag_cohort, covariates_full)
mod_no_year   <- fit_pct_model("percent_deep_sedation_48", diag_cohort, covariates_no_year)

results_year <- rbind(
  extract_lang_rows(mod_with_year, "with_observation_year"),
  extract_lang_rows(mod_no_year,   "without_observation_year")
)

if (!is.null(results_year)) {
  fwrite(results_year,
         file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                   paste0(institution, "_diag_h3_observation_year.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# 3. Hypothesis 1: restrict to IMV >= 24h to match old inclusion criteria
################################################################################
diag_ge24 <- diag_cohort[imv_duration_hours_final >= 24]

mod_ge24_with_year <- fit_pct_model("percent_deep_sedation_48", diag_ge24, covariates_full)
mod_ge24_no_year   <- fit_pct_model("percent_deep_sedation_48", diag_ge24, covariates_no_year)

results_inclusion <- rbind(
  extract_lang_rows(mod_ge24_with_year, "imv_ge24_with_year"),
  extract_lang_rows(mod_ge24_no_year,   "imv_ge24_without_year")
)

if (!is.null(results_inclusion)) {
  fwrite(results_inclusion,
         file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                   paste0(institution, "_diag_h1_imv_ge24h.csv")))
}

# Stratified summary by IMV bin and language (with <10 censoring on n)
strat_summary <- diag_cohort[, .(
  n              = .N,
  mean_pct_ds    = mean(percent_deep_sedation_48,        na.rm = TRUE),
  median_pct_ds  = median(percent_deep_sedation_48,      na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_count_ds  = mean(deep_sedation_count_total_48,    na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_hrs_obs   = mean(hours_mechanically_ventilated_72, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(imv_bin, lang_2)][order(imv_bin, lang_2)]

strat_summary[, n_censored := fifelse(n < 10, "<10", as.character(n))]
strat_summary[n < 10, `:=`(
  n              = NA_integer_,
  mean_pct_ds    = NA_real_,
  median_pct_ds  = NA_real_,
  mean_count_ds  = NA_real_,
  mean_hrs_obs   = NA_real_
)]

fwrite(strat_summary,
       file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                 paste0(institution, "_diag_stratified_by_imv_duration.csv")))

################################################################################
# 4. Hypothesis 2 + 4: rebuild hourly RASS grid and recompute under 4 scenarios
#
# IMPORTANT: this rebuild uses an as-of (rolling) join so each grid hour gets
# the most recent RASS at or before that hour, with a hard look-back limit so
# stale values don't carry forward indefinitely. This mirrors what the pipeline
# does internally. With an exact-timestamp merge instead, the grid would be
# almost entirely empty and LOCF of the imputed hour-0 RASS would saturate
# every patient, producing nonsense.
#
#    Scenario A: new filter (>=4), no paralytic scrub  (= current pipeline)
#    Scenario B: old filter ( >4), no paralytic scrub
#    Scenario C: new filter (>=4), WITH paralytic scrub
#    Scenario D: old filter ( >4), WITH paralytic scrub  (= old behavior)
################################################################################

# How far back to look for "the most recent RASS" when filling a grid hour.
# 12h matches the cohort filter (`rass_frequency_hrs <= 12`) and is what the
# pipeline implicitly tolerates.
ROLL_HOURS <- 12

# Pull RASS for cohort, parsing categorical/numerical the same way as the
# pipeline does
#Fix Hospitalization
# This block adjusts for hospitalizations that are continuous within a health system.
# It looks at patient_id, discharge_dttm, and admission_dttm for hospitalization_ids
# that are close in time, creates new chronological hospitalization_ids, and builds
# a crosswalk (hosp_map) used by read_data() to remap all downstream tables.

read_data_start <- function(file_path, select = NULL) {
  if (grepl("\\.csv$|\\.csv\\.gz$", file_path)) {
    dt <- fread(file_path, select = select)
  } else if (grepl("\\.parquet$", file_path)) {
    if (is.null(select)) {
      dt <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path)
    } else {
      dt <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path, col_select = all_of(select))
    }
  } else if (grepl("\\.fst$", file_path)) {
    if (is.null(select)) {
      dt <- fst::read_fst(file_path)
    } else {
      dt <- fst::read_fst(file_path, columns = all_of(select))
    }
  } else {
    stop("Unsupported file format. Only CSV, Parquet, and FST are supported.")
  }

  dt <- data.table::as.data.table(dt)

  dttm_cols <- names(dt)[grepl("dttm$", names(dt))]
  local_tz  <- time_zone
  message("Using timezone: ", local_tz)

  for (var in dttm_cols) {
    col <- dt[[var]]

    if (inherits(col, "POSIXct")) {
      existing_tz <- attr(col, "tzone")
      if (!is.null(existing_tz) && nzchar(existing_tz) && existing_tz == local_tz) {
        message("✅ ", var, ": tzone already '", local_tz, "', no change")
        next
      }
      if (is.null(existing_tz) || !nzchar(existing_tz) || existing_tz %in% c("UTC", "GMT")) {
        dt[, (var) := lubridate::force_tz(get(var), tzone = local_tz)]
        message("🔧 ", var, ": tzone was '", if (is.null(existing_tz)) "(none)" else existing_tz,
                "', stamped as '", local_tz, "' (no clock shift)")
        next
      }
      warning("⚠️  ", var, ": tzone is '", existing_tz, "', which differs from YAML time_zone '",
              local_tz, "'. Leaving as-is. Check your source data.")
      next
    }

    if (inherits(col, "Date")) {
      dt[, (var) := lubridate::force_tz(as.POSIXct(get(var)), tzone = local_tz)]
      message("📅 ", var, ": Date -> POSIXct midnight, stamped as '", local_tz, "'")
      next
    }

    raw_vec <- if (is.factor(col)) as.character(col) else col
    suppressWarnings(parsed <- lubridate::ymd_hms(raw_vec, quiet = TRUE))
    bad_idx <- is.na(parsed) & !is.na(raw_vec) & nzchar(trimws(raw_vec))
    if (any(bad_idx)) {
      suppressWarnings(parsed_date <- lubridate::ymd(raw_vec[bad_idx], quiet = TRUE))
      parsed[bad_idx] <- as.POSIXct(parsed_date)
    }
    dt[, (var) := lubridate::force_tz(parsed, tzone = local_tz)]
    message("🔧 ", var, ": parsed from character/factor, stamped as '", local_tz, "'")
  }

  dt %>% glimpse()
  return(dt)
}

# Load and clean hospitalization table
clif_hospitalization_start <-
  read_data_start(paste0(data_dir, "clif_hospitalization", file_type)) |>
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm, age_at_admission,
                patient_id, discharge_name, discharge_category) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character)) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_to_lower)) |>
  as.data.table()

# Identify linked encounters (admissions within 6 hours of a discharge)
hospital_blocks <- clif_hospitalization_start[, .(patient_id, hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm)]
setorder(hospital_blocks, patient_id, admission_dttm)

hospital_blocks[, next_diff_time := as.numeric(difftime(
  shift(admission_dttm, type = "lead"), discharge_dttm, units = "hours"
)), by = patient_id]

hospital_blocks[, prev_diff_time := as.numeric(difftime(
  admission_dttm, shift(discharge_dttm, type = "lag"), units = "hours"
)), by = patient_id]

hospital_blocks[, linked := as.integer(next_diff_time < 6 | prev_diff_time < 6)]

# Number link groups within patient using cumsum
hospital_blocks[, link_group := {
  is_new_group <- is.na(shift(linked)) | linked == 0 |
                  (linked == 1 & (is.na(prev_diff_time) | prev_diff_time >= 6))
  cumsum(is_new_group)
}, by = patient_id]

# Merge link group back to full hospitalization table
clif_hospitalization_start <- hospital_blocks[
  clif_hospitalization_start,
  on = .(patient_id, hospitalization_id)
]

# Unlinked hospitalizations get their own block
clif_hospitalization_start[is.na(linked), link_group := .I]
clif_hospitalization_start[, encounter_block := .GRP, by = .(patient_id, link_group)]

# Collapse to one row per encounter block
clif_hospitalization <- clif_hospitalization_start[
  , .(
    hospitalization_id  = hospitalization_id[1],
    age_at_admission    = age_at_admission[1],
    admission_dttm      = admission_dttm[1],
    discharge_dttm      = discharge_dttm[.N],
    discharge_name      = discharge_name[.N],
    discharge_category  = discharge_category[.N]
  ),
  by = .(patient_id, encounter_block)
][, clif_hospitalizations_joined_id := .I]

# Build hosp_map crosswalk for downstream remapping in read_data()
hosp_map <- clif_hospitalization_start[
  clif_hospitalization,
  on = .(patient_id, encounter_block),
  .(
    old_hosp_id              = x.hospitalization_id,
    new_hosp_id              = clif_hospitalizations_joined_id,
    final_admit              = i.admission_dttm,
    final_discharge          = i.discharge_dttm,
    final_discharge_name     = i.discharge_name,
    final_discharge_category = i.discharge_category
  )
]

read_data <- function(file_path, select = NULL) {

  # ---- 1) Read ----
  if (grepl("\\.csv$|\\.csv\\.gz$", file_path)) {
    dt <- data.table::fread(file_path, select = select)

  } else if (grepl("\\.parquet$", file_path)) {
    if (is.null(select)) {
      dt <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path)
    } else {
      dt <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path, col_select = tidyselect::all_of(select))
    }

  } else if (grepl("\\.fst$", file_path)) {
    if (is.null(select)) {
      dt <- fst::read_fst(file_path)
    } else {
      dt <- fst::read_fst(file_path, columns = tidyselect::all_of(select))
    }

  } else {
    stop("Unsupported file format. Only CSV, Parquet, and FST are supported.")
  }

  # Convert to data.table early
  dt <- data.table::as.data.table(dt)

  # ---- 2) Optional remap using hosp_map ----
  if (exists("hosp_map", envir = .GlobalEnv) && "hospitalization_id" %in% names(dt)) {

    hm <- data.table::as.data.table(get("hosp_map", envir = .GlobalEnv))
    if (!"old_hosp_id" %in% names(hm)) stop("hosp_map missing old_hosp_id")

    hm[, old_hosp_id := as.character(old_hosp_id)]
    if ("new_hosp_id" %in% names(hm)) hm[, new_hosp_id := as.character(new_hosp_id)]

    dt[, hospitalization_id := as.character(hospitalization_id)]

    has_dates <- all(c("admission_dttm", "discharge_dttm") %in% names(dt))

    if (has_dates) {
      message("🔄 remapping hosp_id, admit & discharge")
      dt <- hm[dt, on = .(old_hosp_id = hospitalization_id)]
      dt[, hospitalization_id := data.table::fcoalesce(new_hosp_id, old_hosp_id)]

      if ("final_admit"            %in% names(dt)) dt[, admission_dttm      := data.table::fcoalesce(final_admit,            admission_dttm)]
      if ("final_discharge"        %in% names(dt)) dt[, discharge_dttm      := data.table::fcoalesce(final_discharge,        discharge_dttm)]
      if ("final_discharge_name"   %in% names(dt)) dt[, discharge_name      := data.table::fcoalesce(final_discharge_name,   discharge_name)]
      if ("final_discharge_category" %in% names(dt)) dt[, discharge_category := data.table::fcoalesce(final_discharge_category, discharge_category)]

    } else {
      message("🔄 remapping just hosp_id")
      dt <- hm[dt, on = .(old_hosp_id = hospitalization_id)]
      dt[, hospitalization_id := data.table::fcoalesce(new_hosp_id, old_hosp_id)]
    }

    drop_cols <- intersect(
      c("new_hosp_id", "old_hosp_id", "final_admit", "final_discharge",
        "final_discharge_name", "final_discharge_category"),
      names(dt)
    )
    if (length(drop_cols)) dt[, (drop_cols) := NULL]
  }

  # ---- 3) Normalize all *_dttm columns ----
  dttm_cols <- names(dt)[grepl("dttm$", names(dt))]
  local_tz  <- time_zone
  message("Using timezone: ", local_tz)

  for (var in dttm_cols) {

    col <- dt[[var]]

    # Already POSIXct
    if (inherits(col, "POSIXct")) {
      existing_tz <- attr(col, "tzone")

      # Matches YAML tz → leave alone
      if (!is.null(existing_tz) && nzchar(existing_tz) && existing_tz == local_tz) {
        message("✅ ", var, ": tzone already '", local_tz, "', no change")
        next
      }

      # Blank, NULL, or UTC/GMT → stamp with local_tz, no clock shift
      if (is.null(existing_tz) || !nzchar(existing_tz) || existing_tz %in% c("UTC", "GMT")) {
        dt[, (var) := lubridate::force_tz(get(var), tzone = local_tz)]
        message("🔧 ", var, ": tzone was '", if (is.null(existing_tz)) "(none)" else existing_tz,
                "', stamped as '", local_tz, "' (no clock shift)")
        next
      }

      # Different real timezone → warn and leave alone
      warning("⚠️  ", var, ": tzone is '", existing_tz, "', which differs from YAML time_zone '",
              local_tz, "'. Leaving as-is. Check your source data.")
      next
    }

    # Date columns
    if (inherits(col, "Date")) {
      if (identical(var, "death_dttm")) {
        dt[, (var) := lubridate::force_tz(
          as.POSIXct(get(var)) + lubridate::hours(23) + lubridate::minutes(59),
          tzone = local_tz
        )]
        message("📅 ", var, ": Date → POSIXct 23:59, stamped as '", local_tz, "'")
      } else {
        dt[, (var) := lubridate::force_tz(as.POSIXct(get(var)), tzone = local_tz)]
        message("📅 ", var, ": Date → POSIXct midnight, stamped as '", local_tz, "'")
      }
      next
    }

    # Character / factor → parse then stamp
    raw_vec <- if (is.factor(col)) as.character(col) else col

    suppressWarnings(parsed <- lubridate::ymd_hms(raw_vec, quiet = TRUE))

    bad_idx <- is.na(parsed) & !is.na(raw_vec) & nzchar(trimws(raw_vec))
    if (any(bad_idx)) {
      suppressWarnings(parsed_date <- lubridate::ymd(raw_vec[bad_idx], quiet = TRUE))
      offset <- if (identical(var, "death_dttm")) lubridate::hours(23) + lubridate::minutes(59) else 0
      parsed[bad_idx] <- as.POSIXct(parsed_date) + offset
    }

    dt[, (var) := lubridate::force_tz(parsed, tzone = local_tz)]
    message("🔧 ", var, ": parsed from character/factor, stamped as '", local_tz, "'")
  }

  # ---- 4) Peek & return ----
  if (nrow(dt) > 0) utils::str(head(dt))
  return(dt)
}

#RASS
specific_assessment_categories <- c("rass", "RASS")
patient_assessments <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir, "clif_patient_assessments", file_type), select = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm", "assessment_category", "numerical_value", "categorical_value")))[tolower(assessment_category) %in% specific_assessment_categories]
patient_assessments <- unique(patient_assessments, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm", "assessment_category"))
patient_assessments[, assessment_category := tolower(assessment_category)]

#Continuous Meds
specific_med_groups <- c("vasoactives", "sedation", "paralytics", "analgesia", "paralytic")
meds <- as.data.table(read_data(paste0(data_dir,"clif_medication_admin_continuous", file_type), select = c("hospitalization_id", "admin_dttm", "med_dose", "med_dose_unit", "med_category", "med_group", "med_route_category")))[med_group %in% specific_med_groups]
setorder(meds, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)

#####################

pa_diag <- copy(patient_assessments)
pa_diag <- pa_diag[
  hospitalization_id %in% diag_cohort$hospitalization_id &
    assessment_category == "rass"
]
pa_diag[, rass_value := fifelse(
  !is.na(numerical_value),
  as.character(as.integer(numerical_value)),
  fifelse(
    grepl("^\\+?(-?5|-?4|-?3|-?2|-?1|0|1|2|3|4)$", categorical_value),
    as.character(as.integer(sub("^\\+", "", categorical_value))),
    NA_character_
  )
)]
pa_diag <- pa_diag[
  !is.na(rass_value),
  .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm,
    rass_value = as.numeric(rass_value))
]
setorder(pa_diag, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Continuous paralytic admins for cohort
para_diag <- meds[
  hospitalization_id %in% diag_cohort$hospitalization_id &
    med_group %in% c("paralytic", "paralytics") &
    !is.na(med_dose) & med_dose > 0
]

# Build hourly grid: hour 0 -> floor(min(48, imv_duration_hours_final))
diag_cohort[, dur_capped := pmin(48, imv_duration_hours_final)]
diag_cohort[, dur_capped := pmax(0, dur_capped)]

grid <- diag_cohort[, .(
  hour_imv      = 0:floor(dur_capped),
  recorded_dttm = begin_imv + lubridate::hours(0:floor(dur_capped))
), by = hospitalization_id]

# ---- AS-OF JOIN ----
# For each (hospitalization_id, grid hour), find the most recent RASS at or
# before that hour, within ROLL_HOURS.
setkey(pa_diag,  hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)
setkey(grid,     hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# data.table rolling join: roll = ROLL_HOURS*3600 means "carry forward up to
# that many seconds". Match on grid -> nearest prior pa_diag row.
rass_grid <- pa_diag[grid,
                     on = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm"),
                     roll = ROLL_HOURS * 3600]
# After roll join, rass_value is filled for grid rows that had a prior RASS
# within ROLL_HOURS, NA otherwise.

setorder(rass_grid, hospitalization_id, hour_imv)

# Inject hour-0 imputation only where no real RASS rolled in
rass_grid[hour_imv == 0 & is.na(rass_value), rass_value := -5]

# After hour-0 imputation, do a *bounded* LOCF: only carry forward over short
# gaps, not indefinitely. Because the roll join already handled most hours,
# this LOCF should rarely fire — it's a safety net for short within-window
# gaps.
rass_grid[, rass_value := zoo::na.locf(rass_value, na.rm = FALSE),
          by = hospitalization_id]

# ---- Paralytic-hour flag ----
# Mark each hour where any continuous paralytic admin occurred in that hour
# OR the previous hour (admins are documented intermittently while infusion
# is running, so a single admin row covers an interval that extends forward
# in time).
if (nrow(para_diag) > 0) {
  para_diag[, hour_floor := lubridate::floor_date(admin_dttm, "hour")]
  para_hours <- unique(para_diag[, .(hospitalization_id, hour_floor)])
  para_hours <- rbind(
    para_hours,
    para_hours[, .(hospitalization_id,
                   hour_floor = hour_floor + lubridate::hours(1))]
  )
  para_hours <- unique(para_hours)
  para_hours[, paralyzed := TRUE]

  rass_grid[, hour_floor := lubridate::floor_date(recorded_dttm, "hour")]
  rass_grid <- merge(rass_grid, para_hours,
                     by = c("hospitalization_id", "hour_floor"),
                     all.x = TRUE)
  rass_grid[is.na(paralyzed), paralyzed := FALSE]
} else {
  rass_grid[, paralyzed := FALSE]
}

compute_pct_scenario <- function(grid_dt, hour_filter, scrub_paralytic) {
  g <- copy(grid_dt)
  if (scrub_paralytic) {
    g[paralyzed == TRUE & rass_value > -3, rass_value := NA]
  }
  g <- g[hour_filter(hour_imv)]
  g[, deep := !is.na(rass_value) & rass_value <= -3]
  g[, .(
    hours_observed = .N,
    deep_count     = sum(deep),
    pct_deep       = 100 * sum(deep) / pmax(.N, 1L)
  ), by = hospitalization_id]
}

scenA <- compute_pct_scenario(rass_grid,
                              function(h) h >= 4, scrub_paralytic = FALSE)
setnames(scenA, c("hospitalization_id", "obs_A", "cnt_A", "pct_A"))

scenB <- compute_pct_scenario(rass_grid,
                              function(h) h > 4,  scrub_paralytic = FALSE)
setnames(scenB, c("hospitalization_id", "obs_B", "cnt_B", "pct_B"))

scenC <- compute_pct_scenario(rass_grid,
                              function(h) h >= 4, scrub_paralytic = TRUE)
setnames(scenC, c("hospitalization_id", "obs_C", "cnt_C", "pct_C"))

scenD <- compute_pct_scenario(rass_grid,
                              function(h) h > 4,  scrub_paralytic = TRUE)
setnames(scenD, c("hospitalization_id", "obs_D", "cnt_D", "pct_D"))

scenarios <- Reduce(
  function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE),
  list(scenA, scenB, scenC, scenD)
)

diag_cohort_scen <- merge(diag_cohort, scenarios,
                          by = "hospitalization_id", all.x = TRUE)

# Sanity: pct_A should match pipeline's percent_deep_sedation_48 closely
# (will not be exactly 1.0 because the simplified rebuild uses ROLL_HOURS-bounded
# LOCF and a coarser paralytic flag, but should be > 0.9)
sanity_check <- data.table(
  metric = c("correlation_A_vs_pipeline",
             "mean_abs_diff_A_vs_pipeline",
             "median_abs_diff_A_vs_pipeline",
             "n_with_both_values",
             "ROLL_HOURS_used"),
  value = c(
    cor(diag_cohort_scen$pct_A,
        diag_cohort_scen$percent_deep_sedation_48,
        use = "complete.obs"),
    mean(abs(diag_cohort_scen$pct_A -
             diag_cohort_scen$percent_deep_sedation_48),
         na.rm = TRUE),
    median(abs(diag_cohort_scen$pct_A -
               diag_cohort_scen$percent_deep_sedation_48),
           na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(!is.na(diag_cohort_scen$pct_A) &
        !is.na(diag_cohort_scen$percent_deep_sedation_48)),
    ROLL_HOURS
  )
)
fwrite(sanity_check,
       file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                 paste0(institution, "_diag_scenario_A_vs_pipeline_sanity.csv")))

# Fit each scenario, with full covariates (matches primary model RHS) and
# again restricted to IMV >= 24h
results_scenarios <- list()

for (scen in c("A", "B", "C", "D")) {
  outcome <- paste0("pct_", scen)
  label   <- paste0("scenario_", scen,
                    "_filter_",  ifelse(scen %in% c("A","C"), "ge4", "gt4"),
                    "_paraScrub_",
                    ifelse(scen %in% c("A","B"), "off", "on"))

  m_all  <- fit_pct_model(outcome, diag_cohort_scen, covariates_full)
  m_ge24 <- fit_pct_model(outcome,
                          diag_cohort_scen[imv_duration_hours_final >= 24],
                          covariates_full)

  rA <- extract_lang_rows(m_all,  paste0(label, "_full_cohort"))
  rB <- extract_lang_rows(m_ge24, paste0(label, "_imv_ge24h"))

  results_scenarios[[label]] <- rbind(rA, rB)
}

results_scenarios_dt <- do.call(rbind, results_scenarios)
if (!is.null(results_scenarios_dt)) {
  fwrite(results_scenarios_dt,
         file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                   paste0(institution, "_diag_h2_h4_scenarios.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# 5. Differential paralytic-RASS contamination by language
#
# This audit uses the rebuilt grid to ask: when a patient is paralyzed (per the
# paralytic-hour flag), how often do we see a documented RASS value > -3 (i.e.,
# a clinically implausible alert reading on a paralyzed patient)? If this is
# happening more often in one language group, it would specifically inflate
# their denominator without inflating their numerator, biasing percent deep
# sedation toward null in that group.
################################################################################
para_audit <- rass_grid[
  paralyzed == TRUE & !is.na(rass_value),
  .(
    n_paralyzed_hours    = .N,
    n_para_rass_gt_neg3  = sum(rass_value > -3),
    pct_para_rass_gt_neg3 = 100 * mean(rass_value > -3)
  ),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

para_audit <- merge(
  para_audit,
  diag_cohort[, .(hospitalization_id, lang_2)],
  by = "hospitalization_id", all.x = TRUE
)

para_audit_summary <- para_audit[, .(
  n_pts      = .N,
  median_pct = median(pct_para_rass_gt_neg3, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_pct   = mean(  pct_para_rass_gt_neg3, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = lang_2]

para_audit_summary[, n_pts_censored := fifelse(n_pts < 10, "<10",
                                               as.character(n_pts))]
para_audit_summary[n_pts < 10, `:=`(
  n_pts      = NA_integer_,
  median_pct = NA_real_,
  mean_pct   = NA_real_
)]

fwrite(para_audit_summary,
       file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                 paste0(institution, "_diag_h2_paralytic_rass_by_language.csv")))

################################################################################
# 6. Compact summary table comparing language coefficients across scenarios
################################################################################
all_results <- rbind(
  results_year,
  results_inclusion,
  results_scenarios_dt,
  fill = TRUE
)

if (!is.null(all_results)) {
  fwrite(all_results,
         file.path(sedation_diagnostic,
                   paste0(institution, "_diag_summary_all_scenarios.csv")))
}

message("\n--- Diagnostic complete. Outputs in: ", sedation_diagnostic, "\n")
```
